title: Job Opening Teacher at Pune University

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at Pune University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pune University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Teacher to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About Pune University:
Pune University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pune University!
